nasb.text: But resist him, firm in your faith, knowing that the same experiences of suffering are being accomplished by your brethren who are in the world.

esv.text: Resist him, firm in your faith, knowing that the same kinds of suffering are being experienced by your brotherhood throughout the world.

cnv.text: 你們要用堅強的信心抵擋他，因為知道你們在世上的弟兄，也經歷過同樣的苦難。

ccb.text: 你们要以坚固的信心抵挡它，要知道世界各地的弟兄姊妹在遭受同样的苦难。

csbs.text: 你们要用坚固的信仰来抵挡它，因为你们知道，你们在世上的弟兄姐妹也都经历着同样的苦难。
